data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for external directory links to internal users/subjects.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding external directory links to internal users/subjects. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement has been satisfied or any checks related to this aspect. The linked use case mentions the need for these links, but the prior steps do not include any validations or reads that would support this requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of external directory links to internal users/subjects being validated or retrieved.
